tech_news.description: The MacBook Neo may be getting an upgrade with a new processor, more memory, and new colors, but Apple will also likely raise the price.

tech_news.title: WhatsApp adds Apple CarPlay and Android Auto upgrades, iPad sign-ups, and more - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: WhatsApp on Apple CarPlay and Android Auto will let users hear and reply to messages, make calls, view their call history, and access favorite contacts hands-free and right from their car's screen.
